series_metadata.series_description: Complaints and investigative correspondence related to complaint resolution.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until imaged, then shred hard copy. Retain image 2 years from closed case date, then erase. ; Electronic: Retain until imaged, then shred hard copy. Retain image 2 years from closed case date, then erase., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
